title: SourcesDependencyFragment
description: SourcesDependencyFragment: Dependency fragment used to define one or more Relations that originate at the specified sources and use the IBHoMObject owning this fragment as the target.

Sources.description: Collection of Guids of entities that are sources for Relations where the IBHoMObject owning this fragment is the target.

Curves.description: Collection of ICurves used to represent the Relations.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
